e":"newTreasury","type":"address"}],"name":"updateTreasury","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Deploys and registers MarketContract instancesMaintains the canonical registry of all valid Prophet marketsCreation friction design:        - Creator locks a USDT bond (creationBondAmount) when calling createMarket().        - The bond is forwarded to the new MarketContract and held there.        - Bond is refunded to creator on clean resolution or archive (zero interest).        - Bond is forfeited to treasury if the oracle cancels (unresolvable market).        - A 24-hour pending window runs before the market goes Open. Community members          call signalInterest() to express intent (free \u2014 no funds locked). If zero          signals arrive the market auto-archives via archiveMarket().","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. createMarket(string,uint256,string,bytes.details: Creator must have approved this factory for at least creationBondAmount USDT.      The bond is transferred from creator → factory → market contract.      It is returned to the creator on clean resolution or archive.

params.question: The prediction question — max 280 characters
params.resolutionSourcesHash: keccak256 hash of approved sources JSON in 0G Storage

returns.marketAddress: Address of the newly deployed MarketContract

params.limit: Maximum number of markets to return (max 100)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setVaultAndDistributor(address,address).details: Must be called once after all contracts are deployedCan only be set once — prevents accidental overwrite

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateCreationBond(uint256).details: Set to 0 to disable the bond requirement entirely

allMarkets(uint256).notice: All market addresses ever deployed by this factory

creationBondAmount().notice: USDT amount creator must deposit when creating a market

getMarkets(uint256,uint256).notice: Paginated retrieval of all market addresses

getMarketsByCreator(address).notice: Returns all markets created by a specific address

isMarket(address).notice: Quick lookup — is this address a valid Prophet market?

isValidMarket(address).notice: Returns whether a given address is a valid Prophet market

marketMakerAgent().notice: Market maker agent wallet — provides liquidity quotes

marketsByCreator(address,uint256).notice: Markets created by each user address

oracleAgent().notice: Oracle agent wallet — authorized to resolve markets

pause().notice: Pause market creation — emergency use only

paused().notice: Whether the factory is accepting new market creation

payoutDistributor().notice: PayoutDistributor contract address — set after distributor deployment

positionVault().notice: PositionVault contract address — set after vault deployment

protocolTreasury().notice: Protocol treasury — receives 0.5% fee from every market payout

setVaultAndDistributor(address,address).notice: Link PositionVault and PayoutDistributor to this factory

totalMarkets().notice: Returns total number of markets ever deployed

updateCreationBond(uint256).notice: Update the USDT bond required at market creation
